# earmarkIQ

earmarkIQ is a UK-focused AI-powered personal finance
iOS app built by Caolan Preston, a CF30-qualified
FCA Appointed Representative.

## What earmarkIQ does
- Connects all UK bank accounts via Open Banking
- AI financial advisor (Ask IQ) powered by Claude
- Automatic transaction categorisation
- Bill switching recommendations
- NHS, teacher, contractor profession-specific budgeting
- Budget tracking, goals, net worth

## Who it's for
UK professionals — NHS workers, teachers, contractors,
civil servants, police, firefighters, pharmacists,
software developers, solicitors, accountants.

## Pricing
- Free: basic budgeting, 30 AI messages/month
- Plus: £4.99/month, 150 messages
- Pro: £9.99/month, 250 messages
- Unlimited: £14.99/month, 500 messages

## Key URLs
- Homepage: https://earmarkiq.app
- NHS Pay Calculator: https://earmarkiq.app/tools/nhs-pay-calculator
- Salary Sacrifice Calculator: https://earmarkiq.app/tools/salary-sacrifice
- Blog: https://earmarkiq.app/blog

## Regulatory status
FCA Appointed Representative (application pending)
ICO registered: CSN2001882
Companies House: 17056081
